subject: Re: Main house, etc.
body:
please try to find images of small shaded tructures
that I can build and put on the other beaches,, just
so when we are there there is somplace to sit,, and
relax

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

>  Hi Jeffrey,
>  I am working on the main entrance rotunda, and I am
> very happy the way it came along. It meets both of
> our expectations, and really works well with the
> topo. Also, I was able to resolve the main problem
> that I had with her house, I have located the two
> guests bedrooms UNDER her apartement,so when we
> aproach the main entrance we do not have to deal
> with that volume sticking out. I still keep your
> level and hers at the same. For next week I 'll have
> the two more difficult elevations, your side and the
> opposite one. They look amazing! I know too that you
> would like to see all of these now, but let me
> refine it a little bit more and then I will send you
> something or see you to explain it. I just received
> a fax with a sketch for a cover for the beach
> furniture. I will take care as soon as I can. The
> Pool interiors are also going to be ready by next
> weekend, I can't wait to see that building going up!
>  Monday I might go to Geneva for lunch with one of
> the Hottingers, if they cannot come to Paris as was
> planned,at home, to talk a little about their
> interest in organizations like the World Monuments
> Fund.He is one of the heirs of Guermantes. I still
> have to keep the elegance untill September, and not
> talk much about it.I'll let you know. Regards,J.P.
>  
>   
>

body_html:
please try to find images of small shaded tructures
that I can build and put on the other beaches,, just
so when we are there there is somplace to sit,, and
relax

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey,
I am working on the main entrance rotunda, and I am
very happy the way it came along. It meets both of
our expectations, and really works well with the
topo. Also, I was able to resolve the main problem
that I had with her house, I have located the two
guests bedrooms UNDER her apartement,so when we
aproach the main entrance we do not have to deal
with that volume sticking out. I still keep your
level and hers at the same. For next week I 'll have
the two more difficult elevations, your side and the
opposite one. They look amazing! I know too that you
would like to see all of these now, but let me
refine it a little bit more and then I will send you
something or see you to explain it. I just received
a fax with a sketch for a cover for the beach
furniture. I will take care as soon as I can. The
Pool interiors are also going to be ready by next
weekend, I can't wait to see that building going up!
Monday I might go to Geneva for lunch with one of
the Hottingers, if they cannot come to Paris as was
planned,at home, to talk a little about their
interest in organizations like the World Monuments
Fund.He is one of the heirs of Guermantes. I still
have to keep the elegance untill September, and not
talk much about it.I'll let you know. Regards,J.P.
